params.data: Event data for non-indexed event arguments. May be empty if event only has indexed params
params.emitter: Smart contract that emitted the EVM event log(s)
params.eventTopics: List of event topics associated with the event (event signature being first param)

onEvent(address,bytes32[],bytes).notice: Default function invoked for a matching reactivity subscription filter
